context-hub.description: Context Hub — curated API docs for 68+ services (OpenAI, Stripe, AWS, Anthropic, etc.)
tools: chub_search — Search docs/skills by query or tags
chub_get — Fetch doc/skill content by ID (with language/version)
chub_annotate — Attach persistent notes to docs (agent learning)
chub_feedback — Rate docs up/down for maintainers
